# grantory_schema_definition (Data Source)
Use this data source to filter Grantory records inside a Terraform/OpenTofu plan.


## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `schema_definition_id` (String) Identifier of the schema definition to fetch.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `schema` (String) JSON Schema definition payload.
